data.name: Secret Psychology
data.detailed_description:
📌look at this Games📌




📌look at this Games📌



📌look at this Games📌




關於此遊戲


Majoring in psychology and getting closer to graduation as a senior, Makoto Kuroi is advised by Saeko Kawamura, his close friend and junior, to learn [Hypnosis Psychology].
As the clinical psychology center that Makoto was operating on his own nears bankruptcy, he begins to use [Hypnosis Psychology] on his patients...



By using Hypnosis Psychology, the depth psychology of clients can be entered to dominate their hearts and find the origin of their trauma.
Feeling relieved of their issues, the women begin to show their repressed desires to Makoto...



Movement: Directional Keys
Action: Space
Reset: R



Instead of simply corrupting them, the goal of Hypnosis Psychology is to use hypnosis to figure out the women’s pains and help them overcome them!

Enjoy the stories their stories as they overcome their pains to get back on their feet.



Full Voice H Scenes consisting of pure insert scenes only
Full voice story over 2000 sentences (Heroine only)
an easy, easy-to-clear puzzle

data.short_description: Try to understand and solve their pain by using hypnosis! Please enjoy her story of overcoming pain and standing up
data.supported_languages:
英文, 日文*, 簡體中文, 繁體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Window7 SP1/WIN8/WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
